title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.144 - Third week of February, Engineer Awareness Week
text:
9.144.  Third week of February, Engineer Awareness Week. — The third week of February is hereby designated as "Engineer Awareness Week" in the state of Missouri.  The citizens of this state are encouraged to observe the week with appropriate activities and events to promote the engineering discipline to students, expand public recognition of the engineering profession, and celebrate engineering accomplishments.
(L. 2015 H.B. 361)
